# GrokMediaDownloader

> GrokMediaDownloader is a Chrome extension for Grok AI media management. Batch download images and videos, automate video generation with Video Gen Queue, create video stories with Story Mode, capture live streams in real-time, and organize everything into project folders — all processed locally in your browser with zero data collection. Published by Kario Studio. One-time $4.99 PRO lifetime license.

## Key Features
- **Batch Download**: Scan and download all Grok AI images and videos at once with smart filtering by date, type, and resolution
- **Video Gen Queue**: Automate video generation by queuing multiple image posts — the extension auto-generates videos in the background
- **Story Mode**: Merge multiple Grok video clips into a single MP4 using in-browser WebAssembly FFmpeg — no server upload needed
- **Stream Capture**: Real-time DOM observer detects and queues newly generated images as you browse Grok AI
- **Project Download**: Group source images and resulting videos into organized project folders for bulk export
- **HD Upgrade**: One-click upgrade images from standard to high resolution

## Links
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/grok-media-downloader/niebmpjbnghbfnjbbeajlndkjpgpamhi
- GitHub: https://github.com/tomsonlee150/GrokMediaDownloader

## Stats
- 6,000+ active users
- 4.2/5 rating (19 reviews) on Chrome Web Store
- Available in 6 languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, German

## Technical
- 100% client-side processing (WebAssembly FFmpeg, IndexedDB, Chrome Side Panel API)
- No data collection, no server uploads
- Works with Grok AI (grok.com / x.ai)
